reason: The diff plausibly handles the claimed condition by: (1) storing the original client directory before modifying the build.client path when base is configured, (2) nesting the client output under the base prefix so URLs match on-disk paths, (3) moving platform files (.assetsignore, _headers, _redirects) back to the original client root where Cloudflare expects them, and (4) adding tests that verify prerendered pages and public files are placed under the base prefix while platform files remain at the root.
